{{Infobox group
| name = Karoshan Alliance
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Karoshan Alliance Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Karoshan]] [[Alliance]] is a relatively small but formidable political and military coalition consisting of the [[Karoshan Empire]], the [[Visiria system]], and several other minor systems. Despite its limited size compared to larger entities like the [[Galactic Union]], it possesses significant power and resources. The [[Alliance]] is currently experiencing internal instability due to a civil war between the forces of [[King Regent]] [[Felrex]] and a rebel faction led by a rightful [[Queen]]. This conflict has divided loyalties among its members, such as the prominent [[Visiri]] planets. The [[Alliance]]'s military is characterized by its distinct technology, featuring blocky, black spacecraft and massive space colonies shaped like obsidian cubes. Their fleet includes everything from standard cruisers equipped with starfighters to immense, six-mile-long dreadnoughts capable of dominating large enemy forces. [[Karoshan]] soldiers are often viewed with fear by others in the galaxy, sometimes even being used as cautionary tales. The [[Alliance]] also utilizes mages for specialized tasks, such as sealing incursions or providing defensive support.}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan Alliance]] has put out a call for mages to seal a potential [[D’Niss]] incursion.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan Alliance]] is one of the major powers in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan Alliance]] provides reports to [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Karoshan Alliance]] is one of the four corners of the galaxy.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is part of the [[Karoshan Alliance]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1">''The Knight'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Karoshan Alliance]] previously cobbled together a fleet with the [[Galactic Union]] and [[Starhammer]] to kill the narrator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Karoshan Alliance]] is a political entity or alliance.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Force]] were not enemies with the [[Karoshan Alliance]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Karoshan Alliance]] is a mutual enemy of the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] has contacted the [[Karoshan Alliance]] for an official research partnership.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Karoshan Alliance]] is a group that the [[Galactic Union]] might target.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“We’ve already contacted the Karoshan Alliance for an official research partnership, but that won’t be your concern until manufacturing begins.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
